entry.title: Re: Unlocking Innovation: Understanding SAP's Clean Core and Its Benefits (for IT Leaders)
entry.content: Arpit, this is very helpful, thank you for investing the time to pull this together!!!

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Paris #9
entry.content:
Le SAP Community Meetup est de retour à Paris, dans un format plus léger et convivial !

Rejoignez-nous pour une soirée d’échanges, de collaboration et de networking autour de SAP. Une belle opportunité pour partager vos expériences, discuter des dernières tendances… et passer un bon moment entre passionnés.

🍒Cerise sur le gâteau: les SAP Developer Advocates @noravonthenen et @KevinR seront parmi nous pour partager leur énergie, leurs insights et peut-être quelques scoops SAP 😉

Ne ratez pas cette belle occasion de (re)connecter avec la communauté dans une ambiance fun et authentique.

À très vite !

entry.title: Re: Extend S/4HANA Material Master with Custom Fields and...
entry.content:
Hello,

The custom fields and logic application for key user extensibility is robust enough to enhance the Material Master tables and the Material Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) as well.

Kindly check the below for more information.

  1. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/adding-field-in-standard-fiori-apps-of-s-4hana-with-custom-fields-and-logic/ba-p/13443650
  2. https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/how-to-create-a-custom-field-with-custom-field-and-logic-app-and/ba-p/13579777

entry.title: Re: Disaggregation from Month to Weeks in IBP - Integers...
entry.content: Hi @Andrei_Lupu ! This did work, however the numbers on some items are far off their original quantities. Do you know how to view the calculations carried out to get these numbers so I can get a better understanding of the data?

entry.title: Error in /DBE/MASSACTIONS in vss
entry.content:
Hi experts, I need your help with this error with the transaction /DBE/MASSACTIONS. At the same time, I converted this code to Fiori apps, so the error is present in both areas, GUI/FIORI.

When I execute, it doesn't load the vehicle and shows me the next error.

Before that, i assigned role vms to this user.

First of all, I assign the SAP_ALL profile to check if work and everything loads correctly, I use the STUSERTRACE to trace the different errors or the auth obj that used, but it doesn't work. 

What could be the error in this case?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: CJ20N - Custom Tab disable/enable based on user.
entry.content:
Hi,

Custom tab is created in CJ20N within SAP Fiori using the Custom Fields app. appended all field in PRPS table.

I need when user open the Transaction CJ20N than custom tab fields will be enable/disable based on user.

I am using S4 HANA 2023 version.

Any help will be appreciated.

Thanks,

Priyanka soni

entry.title: Re: Auto language translation - SAP Webi
entry.content:
This may not be the best answer but it will get you part of the way there.

  1. Design the report in your first language.
  2. Copy the report table and paste it next to the first.
  3. Change the headers and any literal items to the second language.
  4. Set the table properties on the each of these tables, to be Hide When Formula Is True.
  5. Set each table's formula, to use the =GetContentLocale() function.  For instance, =GetContentLocale() <> 'en_US' will hide this table if the viewer profile's locale setting is not English US.  Set the other table to <> Arabic. 
  6. Align the tables so they are on top of each other.
  7. If a viewer's profile is set to English, the Arabic table will be hidden and they'll see the US version.  If the profile is Arabic, the English will be hidden and they'll see the Arabic version.
  8. Numbers and dates are automatically converted to format based on the Local setting preference.
  9. Each viewer will need to set their profile's location setting to their preferred language.

This will work for headings and literals but unfortunately, it won't translate data fields like names or product descriptions.  To do that, you may need to have alternate lookup tables for multiple languages.  I hope this helps.

entry.title: What is the best way to have an external API make a UPDATE/POST call into SAP RDC?
entry.content: Trying to run a postman call into SAP to build a tool for automating erp implementations. RFC seems to be too outdated, so I need a minimum viable path into doing this.

entry.title: iContent Storage Managment
entry.content: We “self-manage” our iContent Storage but we have not touched it since we implemented it several years ago. I am interested in learning from others best practices on managing the storage. For example, if a course is no longer active, do you delete the files off the server? What type of clean up/maintenance do you perform? Anything else to consider on this topic?

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: I don't see it as a fix, I was running the latest SP... It's more a requirement in order to run in a web farm environment. Therefore I'd expect some release notes saying the registry entries are required when web farm/multiple worker processes are needed. Others will still need to request the script you provided. Anyway I'm grateful for your assistance because I wouldn't have the solution without it.

entry.title: Re: Field Values in Intelligent Event Processing custom e...
entry.content:
Hi, 2023_Kurt,
From built-in help in IEP, I see a definition for Event Name:


For Event Context, I do not see anything specific to IEP itself-> I will request this be added. 

It appears that the various Use Cases document what they want for Event Context :
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/filter-event-types?q=event+context

Business Process Monitoring:

  • Event Context: You can enter an asterisk (*) in this field or a pattern of the event name. For example if the event name is Billing Documents Not Posted to Accounting, you can enter the pattern, *Billing Documents*.

Business Service Management:

  • Event Context: Enter the service name as found in the Service Information tab of an event for this service. You can enter an asterisk (*) in this field or enter the pattern of the service name. For example if the service name is MyAIN_01, you can enter a pattern, *MyAIN*.


Health Monitoring:

  • Event Context: You can enter an asterisk (*) in this field.

Integration Monitoring:

  • Event Name: Enter the event name found under the Event Configuration section. You can enter an asterisk (*) in this field.

  • Event Context: You can enter an asterisk (*) in this field or a pattern of the event name. For example if the event name is Erroneous CPI messages, you can enter the pattern, *CPI*.


Job & Automation Monitoring

  • Event Context: You can enter an asterisk (*) in this field or a pattern of the event name. For example if the event name is Critical Execution Status for job detected, enter the patter *Critical Execution*.


    Hopefully this information is helpful to you. 
    Best regards,
    Paula

entry.title: Re: WalkMe SAP SuccessFactors content free to use? (WEF-1...
entry.content: @ArjenVHooydonk The ability to access a library of content, as well as customize content, is part of a Premium license. However, there is some out-of-the box content we are providing all SuccessFactors customers. That content is not customizable (nor do you get access to the analytics), but it will be a way to gain immediate value - plus you'll get to test out part of WalkMe's capabilities. This will be available in the 1H release, which is just in a couple weeks! You need to enable it in the admin center. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Missing annotations in metadata
entry.content: /sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='%2TEST%2FUI_TABLES_O2_VAN',Version='0001')/$metadata?sap-language=EN returns with Resource not found for URI segment 404 not found

entry.title: Re: Pre-built WalkMe guided tours in 1H2025 release
entry.content: To create/customize your own content, you would need a Premium license for this. The premium license will also include digital adoption analytics and insights (key to understanding where employees get stuck or struggle), a library of content, intuitive authoring tools, best practice templates, task automation, adaptive guidance, etc. With the embedded content that is included for all SuccessFactors customers, you'll be able to turn that on in admin center. This brings immediate value to you and also enables you to test out some of WalkMe's capabilities! Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Field Values in Intelligent Event Processing custom e...
entry.content: Thank you for the reply. i have browsed the page you offered, but I was hoping someone had some concrete examples for Health Monitoring IEPs. If i figure out/find out anything, I will pass it along.

entry.title: SAP Developer News May 1st, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION

PODCAST: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/05/01/sap-developer-news-may-1st-2025/

ABAP Challenge for May

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/sap-community-escape-house-for-may-abap-cloud/ba-p/14073134

UI5ers live

  • Webinar May 8th: https://www.linkedin.com/events/7321157596495699970/about/
  • Previous episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLHUs_FUbq4dX8lUBM21QKGC_9CwCe6mBC

New adapters in SAP Integration Suite

  •  Anaplan: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/anaplan-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089229
  • HubSpot adapter: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/hubspot-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089261
  • Azure Cosmos DB: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/azure-cosmos-db-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089244
  • Amazon EventBridge: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/amazon-eventbridge-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089251
  • Google PubSub: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/google-pubsub-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089236
  • IBM MQ (REST) adapter: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/ibm-mq-rest-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089258
  • Salesforce PubSub adapter: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/salesforce-pub-sub-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089266
  • LeanIX adapter: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/leanix-adapter-for-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/14089267
  • RFC Adapter in Edge Integration Cell: https://help.sap.com/whats-new/cf0cb2cb149647329b5d02aa96303f56?locale=en-US&Component=Cloud+Integration;Edge+Integration+Cell

SAP Build Extensibility Wizard

  • Simplify SAPUI5 Code Extensions with the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard (blog post) https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/simplify-sapui5-code-extensions-with-the-sap-build-extensibility-wizard/ba-p/14087839

SAP Build New Pricing and Packaging

  • Introducing the New Pricing and Packaging for SAP Build: A Unified Experience for all Developers (blog post) https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/introducing-the-new-pricing-and-packaging-for-sap-build-a-unified/ba-p/14086382

 

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:10 ABAP Challenge for May

1:00 UI5ers live

1:48 New adapters in SAP Integration Suite

2:38 SAP Build Extensibility Wizard

3:46 SAP Build New Pricing and Packaging 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for May the 1st, 2025.

[Mamikee] We have an exciting new developer challenge for the month of May. And yes, it's all about ABAP. This time, we're putting the spotlight on extensibility. That means we'll be getting into areas like adjusting software behavior beyond standard configuration, extending the data model, and exposing additional data, and much more. Now, the ABAP room will be unlocked starting May 5th and will remain open until the end of the year. But remember, the challenge closes on May 31st, so make sure to escape the room before that to earn your badge. Now, just like previous challenges, participating is really easy. All you need to do is visit the SAP Community Escape House, enter your numeric SAP Community user ID, and then you select the ABAP Limit Room. To learn more about the challenge and many more others, click the link in the description below. And remember, have fun!

[Nico] Hi everyone and welcome to the sap developer news we would like to point your attention to the upcoming ui5ers live webinar happening on May 8th and it will be about AI-powered ui5 applications built with LM studio and the speaker of the webinar will be Peter Music the Chief development architect of ui5 and I definitely think you shouldn't miss this one it's open it's free and anybody can join. And in case you're interested in the previous 44 episodes of UI5ers Live, you can watch the recordings of those on the UI5 YouTube channel. I'll put the link to that in the description of this video as well. All right, hope to talk to you soon. Bye.

[Antonio] Hola, SAP developers. In the integration space, this week is all about new adapters available in SAP Integration Suite. There's a new adapter for Anaplan and HubSpot. Interacting with databases there's a new adapter for Azure Cosmos DB. To power your event-driven architectures, the following new adapters are available. Amazon EventBridge, Google PubSub, IBM MQ REST adapter, and Salesforce PubSub adapter. Related to enterprise architecture management, there's a new LeanIX adapter. And last but centrally, not least, the RFC adapter is coming for the Edge Integrational Cell Runtime. If you want to learn more about each adapter, check out the links, including the description. Ciao!

[DJ] There are a lot of different approaches for extending SAP Fiori apps, powered by SAPUI5, of course. There are adaptation projects for key users and for developers, and there's SAPUI5 flexibility. There's a helpful blog post by Oliver Gref that covers these approaches and also mentions the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard that you should definitely check out. The wizard was introduced in the context of SAP S4 HANA Cloud and consolidates multiple extension options. The most recent update added the ability to create sap ui5 adaptation projects making it the go-to facility in sap build for extending sap business suite check out Oliver's blog post it's got lots of really helpful links to the right parts of the SAP help portal on all of this link in the description

[Thomas] Hey, I'm here in the Newtown Square offices with Josh Bentley, and we're working on a workshop around our organization, but I want to talk to you today about SAP Build. Just Announce is new pricing and bundling options for SAP Build. So in the past, if you wanted to use multiple of the capabilities that are part of SAP Build, You had to license and enable them separately, and there's quite a few of those capabilities. Maybe you want to use build code and build process automation and build apps, and that was a lot of work. The powers that be at SAP heard your feedback around that, and they want to make it easier for you to use all the capabilities of SAP Build. Therefore, there's new bundling options where you could purchase SAP Build and a single license that will give you all the capabilities under SAP Build, including the ABAP cloud capabilities. So to read more about all the options, how they're priced, how they're sized, check out Thomas Balmering's blog post. The link to that will be in the description below.

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Innovation: Understanding SAP's Clean Core and Its Benefits (for IT Leaders)
entry.content: Excellent blog.  Thank you for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Hi, can I directly access dynamicconfiguration variab...
entry.content:
Xpath is meant for payload. You can refer payload and put a condition. For headers, like you have showed, you can use context object, but these are inbuilt and created by SAP. only those available headers you can use. 

You can try this, convert one flow into 3. 

1. Your existing flow REST to REST. Here you send the request to either any of below two flows, contruct the target endpong like /RestAdapter/tau_header_content_type,  /RestAdapter/header_content_type

2. New ICO for channel 1 (Rest to Rest)(sender url/RestAdapter/tau_header_content_type)
3. New ICO for channel 2 ( Rest to Rest)( /RestAdapter/header_content_type)

entry.title: Re: Do i need to create an index CDHDR?
entry.content: I guess: SAP Hana, Platform edition. I did it. Could also be S/4HANA.

Hi, Christopher_J,
What if you do something like the following:

 

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM Event Notification Recipients templates for...
entry.content: In case you feel we have missed your intent here, do let us know.

entry.title: Re: End-to-end Testing using Peppol Exchange in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition
entry.content:
We're able to generate eInvoices via the format and send to Peppol, but they never get received.  I was able to boomerang a couple of invoices back to same S4HC system as supplier invoices, but am trying to send to Peppol and then on to Concur Invoice.  I tried adding and remove Destinations to see if it needs to doesn't need them mapped on both BTP Doc compliance instances.

In the 4 corners - here are stopping points:

1. S4HC QA system (public cloud). eDocument Cockpit send invoice. Success

2. BTP Doc Compliance - Peppol Exchange > Monitor Documents in our Test instance. Success - Document pushed...

3. Peppol network (not sure what tools to monitor)

4. Receiver access point -  BTP (production) Doc Compliance - Peppol Exchange > Monitor Documents with Concur Invoice Destination (Production).  Peppol monitor is empty. No emails in our ebilling mailbox. No errors. Nothing shows up Peppol app or in Resolve errors in Doc compliance app.

5. Receive - Concur Invoice - nothing received

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Calendar integration into Microsoft Office 365 (incl. Microsoft Teams)
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm getting this error message when creating a synced calendar event:

  • AADSTS900384: JWT token failed signature validation [Reason - Key was found, but use of the key to verify the signature failed., Thumbprint of key used by client: '[redacted]', Found key 'Start=03/06/2025 17:02:10, End=03/06/2030 17:02:10'

In Azure AD, the application sign-in log shows successful sign-ins (meaning the app & tenant IDs are correctly configured in SAC). 

I speculate the issue is because we are in the GCC High cloud, and SAC is not configured to support multiple clouds (see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity-platform/msal-configuration#multiple_clouds_supported).

Is there anything we can do to troubleshoot this issue?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: remove multiple test cases ALM Cloud
entry.content: Marking this as the solution. If you feel we missed your point, please let us know.

entry.title: SuccessFactors - Offboarding Email Setup based on Event Reasons
entry.content:
Hello All,

For SuccessFactors Offboarding process currently we have Email service configured to trigger email for employees based on the Event reason. 

Now as per the new requirement, we need to setup 2 separate emails with different attachments based on event reason ( to be mapped in business rules).

Currently we use standard email template but I think I may need a new email template and rules for this. 

Any suggestions ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Hi, can I directly access dynamicconfiguration variable inside Integrated Configuration?
entry.content: It can be done by making use of the DynamicConfigurationBean on the sender/receiver channel configuration as long as it's supported by the adapter.

entry.title: Re: Failed to get database information from system landsc...
entry.content: I wish someone would have answered you. I get the same issue and in the SLD, the database user = "database user" instead of the B1xxxx number

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection validation error with RFC_COMMUNICATION_FAILURE
entry.content:
When I validate my connection to on-prem system which I'm connecting to via Cloud Connector I get an error RFC_COMMUNICATION_FAILURE timed out waiting for tunnel to open for tunnel.  I have checked Cloud Connector and everything is green.  I have elevated tracing in Cloud Connector but I'm not seeing any ERROR messages.  I'm running the latest version of Cloud Connector.  This is for SAP Datasphere - Free Tier so I'm assuming I can connect to an on-prem instance of SLT to test replication.

Thanks

Jay

entry.title: Story report query difficulty linking assessment question ID to user results against questions
entry.content:
I am attempting to use a SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics Story Report against the Learning data repository to build a dashboard that analyzes user performance against questions from the assessment functionality within the SAP SuccessFactors Learning system. I need to be able to link the question ID to the users' results against questions and there appears to be no way to do this, but honestly I'm not sure. I require assistance in the hopes that this is possible, and not a design flaw in the LMS schema definitions with the Story query building functionality.

Has anyone tried and succeeded with something like this? Help please!

entry.title: System Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: How to find Finance inconsistencies?
entry.content:
When transitioning to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition or SAP On-Premise, it is crucial to recognize potential inconsistencies in Finance within the Customizing and the Transactional Data in your Production SAP ERP system.  Recognizing these inconsistencies will prepare you to proactively address and correct issues that arise during the conversion process.

How to detect inconsistencies in the Customizing?

Run the Simplification Item report <SE38> SDF/RC_START_CHECK. The report will display all Simplification Items (SI) relevant to your system.  Any inconsistencies identified in the report need to be addressed and resolved before the Software Update Manager (SUM) is executed.

Tip!  The initial task for the SUM is to run the SI report. If any errors occur while the SUM is in execution, the process will be aborted and will be unable to proceed until the errors are addressed and resolved.

How to detect inconsistencies in the Transactional Data and Totals?

 SAP recommends running specific reports in your Production SAP ERP system to identify any data discrepancies that need to be addressed. These reports will compare data between different table structures within the submodules to ensure accuracy.

Tip! The FIN_XX_CORR_RECONCILE reports examine transactional data specifically designed for the SAP S/4HANA conversion. These programs initiate checks like those performed in SAP S/4HANA by the Finance Data Migration process. For more details about these programs, please refer to my blog post 

System Conversion_ Finance Consistency checks of Transactional Data 

Finance Consistency Checks: FIN_CORR_MONITOR

Material Ledger Consistency Checks: FIN_ML_CORR_RECONCILE

Fixed Assets Consistency Checks: FIN_AA_CORR_RECON & FIN_AA_CORR_DISPLAY

It is important to highlight that the consistency check reports executed in your Production SAP ERP system may not identify all inconsistencies, which are attributed to limitations in the database and table structures. Furthermore, it is essential to acknowledge that the consistency checks available in the SAP ERP system will not be entirely comparable to those executed in the S/4HANA system.

Please be aware that new inconsistencies may arise after converting to SAP S/4HANA and during the Finance Data Migration process (Transaction FINS_MIG_STATUS). It is important to understand that these new inconsistencies could not be identified before reaching this stage of the conversion process, because the ECC system had not yet transitioned to SAP S/4HANA and adopted the new data model in Finance.

In my next blog post, I will explain the proposed SAP Sandbox conversion approach, emphasize the significance of following the outlined steps during your initial Sandbox iteration, and discuss the implications that the results provide for the overall Conversion System project.

For more details about this blog's activities, please check

 SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition  System Conversion> Reconciliation of Financial Data

SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - System Conversion >Functional Pre Conversion Activities

SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - System Conversion> Functional Pre-Conversion Activities: Finance Specific

Conclusion

In summary, when transitioning to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition or SAP On-Premise, it is essential to execute a review of Customizing and Transactional Data on your existing SAP ERP system. Identifying inconsistencies early in the process will prepare you to proactively address and correct issues that may arise during the conversion process.

Please “like” if you found this blog post interesting!  

Please add in the comment section any additional topics you think are valuable to have included in this and future blog posts.

– Brought to you by the S/4HANA RIG

entry.title: Re: How to restrict contingent worker to access SuccessFactors Internal Career Site via SAP Identity
entry.content: Thanks for the great information. What will happen if continent workers click on Careers tab - will it take them to external career site?

entry.title: Re: Tariff number not appearing in GTS license
entry.content: You need to maintain the numbering scheme in "Assign Numbering Scheme to Legal Regulations". Assign it both for "Numbers in Legal Control" and "Tariff Numbers".

entry.title: Re: Tips & Tricks with SAP Business Network for Logistics
entry.content: This is super helpful! One question regarding attachments - here, you talk about attachments coming through to the shipper from the carrier. Is it possible for the shipper to attach files in API messages to the carrier in FC?

entry.title: Re: SSO Companion without prior Enable Now login
entry.content:
Hi Marie,

If authors can see content in SAP Companion and the content is published, the most likely issue is that you have the editing pencil configured to be available in Production.  You must remove the editing pencil in Production to allow end users to see the content.  Have a look at this SAP KBA that provides more information about this issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: OUTPUT TYPE SPED TRIGGER INBOUND DELIVERY AFTER PGI FOR INTRA-COMPANY STO’S OUTBOUND DELIVERY
entry.content:
I have done all the configuration suggested. but still when i trigger out it is failing , error which iaam getting is attached.

please help me iam stuck

entry.title: EnableNow hands on guide template default is missing in Producer
entry.content:
In Producer while attempting to generate documentation for a tutorial recently created, I noticed that the hands-on guide template is no longer correct.  I have attached the message I get when I go to generate.

In Producer when I access previously published items the template is gone but when I check the Learner View thankfully it is still present.

Would anyone know how I go about find and reattaching the Hands on Guide template to the settings in Producer?

entry.title: Re: PLA-49117 - New Account Data Permissions
entry.content:
Hey there, through trial and error, we noticed that we had lost the visibility to the login name (for us it's the employee # which the admins use quite frequently), by enabling the permission to view the login name for our group, we can now see it again.  Check https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-release-information/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/7d1871a75c454a818248db242cb92a14.html

Good luck!

Sonia

entry.title: How to move direct transfer Migration Projects (Fiori app Migration Cockpit) to other systems?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We're using direct transfer Migration Objects in our Migration Cockpit and would like to transport them not only between clients, but also between systems/to higher environments. For instance: from Development to Quality.

Based on the official documentation, we successfully transported such objects between different clients (using transaction STMS), but we'd also like to confirm something else:

  • Is the transport functionality the correct option to move direct transfer Migration Objects to higher environments/systems, as Quality/Test? Or is there an alternative approach available?

We're using an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, 2023, FPS 01.

Thanks!

Best regards,
Data migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to move direct transfer Migration Projects (Fiori...
entry.content:
Dear team,

Indeed, using the transport functionality is the correct way to move/transport Migration Objects/Projects from Development to Quality/Test. You can find more information about this in the link below:

  • Transporting Migration Objects to the Test System | SAP Help Portal

We also have an SAP Note to present the modifiability and transport concepts applied to the direct transfer migration method. It redirects to the same official documentation you linked in your question:

  • 3043614 - Modifiable Systems and Transport Concept, SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit - Migrate Data Directly From SAP

I hope this helps with your query!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Documentation related to replacing OpenText ICC for OCR with third party OCR solution
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to replace OpenText Invoice Capture Center (ICC) with a third party OCR solution. Current configuration is designed to use OpenText Invoice Capture Center (ICC).

If we have to go with an other OCR solution, may I know what all configurations that needs to be changed at high level?

Any documentation for reference to use OpenText VIM with third party OCR solution will be really helpful.

Regards,

Sarath Garre.

entry.title: how to configure a Business Partner (BP) to act as both a customer and a supplier
entry.content: In my project i need to setup a new BP who should serve as a customer and supplier. What are the basic configurations to be done for this? We already have BP'S as a separate customers and vendors. Now a single BP needed to take the roles of both customer and vendor.

entry.title: SAP Business One Webclient Extension does not show
entry.content:
After uploading the mtar through Extension Manager nothing appears in the Extensions menu.

The same issue after uploading the samples as per SAP Help. 

Is there any configuration missing?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Add Measure Calculation based on Measure Input Control Selection
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Created a measure input control in SAC table story as follows: 

I have a requirement to create restricted / calculated measures based on Measure input control selection. 

Is this achievable using script variables or by any other options?

entry.title: Re: Request for the CodeJam in Tbilisi, end of May, SAP HANA Cloud for AI Applications: ML, Vectors,
entry.content: This was is approved and scheduled now: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-generative-ai-hub-on-sap-ai-core/ev-p/14090952

entry.title: Re: How to upload usage data from the SAP Solution Manager to the SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migratio
entry.content:
Hi Olga, 

We have been collecting usage data in Solution manager for a number of years.  We would like to use the custom code migration app in BTP and upload the usage.  Everything seems to be set up correctly and I can see the custom code application trying to get the usage data from solution manager by calling fm AGS_CC_UPL_GET_LUSG_4_OBJECT.  The project does not reflect any usage data, entries are either "unknown" or "referenced"  .  It looks like the FM is trying to get the usage data from info cube 0SM_UPLLD .  I don't see any usage data in this info cube.  I do see it in 0SM_UPLDD.  Just trying to figure out how we can get this usage data into the custom code migration app.  

 

Thanks. 

Jeff Refka

entry.title: Re: Provisioning between MRP storage areas
entry.content: Thanks Caetano, question: after reviewing SAP APO, will this advanced planning allow me to provision MRP areas from different parts without needing the BADI?

entry.title: Migrating SAP Content Server 6.40 / MaxDB 7.9.08 from RHEL 7.x to RHEL 8.x version
entry.content:
Hi,

We are planning to move to RHEL 8.x version , as RHEL 7.x will be out of support.

For this, our current SAP Content Server 6.40 version running on MaxDB 7.9.08 database / RHEL 7.x server  , needs to be migrated to new RHEL 8.x server ... 

As per SAP PAM , current SAP CS 6.40/6.50 version is not supported and will need to upgrade SAP CS 7.53/7.54 version for RHEL 8.x platform ... but since we already have 3 TB MaxDB database storing DMS documents with SAP CS application ...

So, for this, can you please guide me overview of steps to follow ? 

Thanks,

Mohan

entry.title: Recalculation of SLED
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if it's possible to prevent the system from calculating or recalculating the SLED (Shelf Life Expiration Date) in the 'Post Goods Movements' app (MIGO).

When posting a goods receipt for a batch, the system is automatically recalculating the SLED, and I would like to understand if there is a way to avoid this behavior.

Any insights or configuration tips would be appreciated.

Thanks and regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Recalculation of SLED
entry.content:
Hi,

Please take a look at the following link from SAP Help:

  • Checking and Calculating the Shelf Life Expiration Date
  • Shelf Life Expiration Date Check

According to the SAP Help, the Checking and Calculating of the Shelf Life Expiration Date occurs during the following procedures:

  • At goods receipt (GR)
  • Upon automatic goods movements

If you specified total shelf life in the material master, then the system calculates SLED from the production date and adds the total shelf life days too. If you haven't specified the total shelf life, then the system considers the date entered in the material document as SLED. Whenever the system calculates SLED, the same will be updated in the master batch record.

This is standard behavior.

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Re: EnableNow hands on guide template default is missing...
entry.content:
Hi,

The actual Word template that is used to generate documentation is located in the Resources > Adaptable Resources > Documentation Style object in Producer.  So, as a starting point, I would try:

1. Open Producer
2. Right click the Resources > Adaptable Resources > Documentation Style object and choose Server Actions > Update from Server.  If the Word template is still in

Manager, this will download it to Producer and you should then be able to generate successfully again

If that has not fixed the issue, you will need to update the actual template settings used to generate the documentation or reload the missing Word template into Producer.  To identify the issue:

1. Open Producer
2. Open the Resources > Documentation Settings section and click on the Hands On Guide template
3. Check which Word template is used to generate that documentation, it's the value located in the Template field

 

 

4. Check in the Resources > Adaptable Resources > Documentation Styles object to determine if the template is actually there.  If it is not, either add it to this section or select another template in the Documentation Settings area

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP SF EC TIME MANAGEMENT
entry.content: Hi, Xavier, if that case please report a ticket under Employee Central so our support engineer can take a deep check and see why it does not work. It is hard for us to answer detailed configuration issues which may be caused by many factors.

entry.title: Re: Pre-built WalkMe guided tours in 1H2025 release
entry.content: Are we able to access the pre-built SAP-managed WalkMe content without the Premium licence? For example there are a few Guided Tours provided as part of 1H2025 which I'm trying to review. We were previously a WalkMe customer but then it was decommissioned. We still appear to have the WalkMe extension but there's no WalkMe content showing in our MMDEV environment. Is it possible to preview the SAP-managed WalkMe content in our DEV environment or would we need to wait until 1H2025 release has been moved in to our Production environment?

entry.title: Re: Active Directory Plus On Prem - Integration
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

We have email and account creation working at the moment via CSV files which I would like to avoid because there are other issues. This would be an expansion of the integration to share changes/updates to employee names, locations, job titles etc...  We also have ManageEngine Plus which currently sits between SF and AD on prem. So I'm looking for existing connectors verses creating custom integrations if possible.

Thanks

Vikas

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Night Brisbane May 2025
entry.content:
Come along to the SAP Inside Track Night Brisbane!. This event will be held on Tuesday May 27th 2025 from 5pm – 8pm at the SAP Office Brisbane, Level 20 , 140 Creek Street.

We have talks lined up from fellow community members Shaun Oosthuizen (Accenture) and Marcelo Rodrigues Da Silva (KPMG).

We'd also like to invite you along to grab a drink, share a slice of pizza & join us in conversation during our networking break out sessions.

As always, please ensure you reserve your spot by booking a ticket from our eventbrite page as spaces are limited and we are require to provide your registered details for safety compliance to the venue.  Confirmation via the SAP Community event page will not reserve your place.

Huge huge thanks to Alex Bauer and the amazing team at SAP for hosting us.  We would not be able to run these events without the fantastic support from the local Brisbane business community.

Session 1: Evolving as an SAP Functional Consultant in a Cloud World (Marcelo Rodigues Da Silva)

In the Clean Core era, the role of the SAP Functional Consultant is evolving. This session explores how embracing citizen development tools and understanding new extensibility methods can empower consultants to become SAP Business Technologists. Through practical demos and real-world examples, we’ll cover key innovations in reporting, integration, custom data modeling, and enhancement techniques equipping experienced SAP professionals with the mindset and skills needed to thrive in the cloud-first, upgrade-safe landscape.

Session 2: TBC (Shaun Oosthuizen)

We are just in the process of finalising the details of this talk and once complete we will update the agenda.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025
entry.content:
****** SITSAL 2025 *****

No dia 26 de abril de 2025, tivemos o privilégio de realizar mais uma edição do SITSAL, desta vez no acolhedor Hotel Porto Belo, em Ondina, Salvador. O evento foi um verdadeiro sucesso, reunindo 145 participantes que compartilharam conhecimento, experiências e reflexões valiosas sobre temas essenciais para a nossa área.

Nosso sincero agradecimento aos palestrantes que enriqueceram o evento com suas contribuições: Manuel Robalinho, Ilíada Campos, Eliana Lanna, Lucas Ferreira, Luciano Casado, Fabio Dezan, Marssel Vilaça, Aline Damasceno e João Otto. Suas apresentações foram inspiradoras e trouxeram insights fundamentais para todos os presentes.

Ao longo do evento, foram abordados temas de grande relevância, como TAXBRA, inteligência artificial, JOULE, entre outros, proporcionando discussões ricas e profundas sobre inovação, tecnologia e o futuro do setor.

Também expressamos nossa gratidão aos participantes, que fizeram do SITSAL 2025 um ambiente de troca e aprendizado. A energia, o engajamento e o entusiasmo de cada um mostraram o quanto esse encontro é significativo para todos nós.

Seguimos motivados para as próximas edições, levando adiante a missão de promover conhecimento e fortalecer nossa comunidade. Até o próximo SITSAL!

Ganhadores Livros SAP PRESSEquipe de VoluntáriosAlmoço PalestrantesFotos EventoFotos EventoFotos EventoEliana LannaFotos EventoFotos EventoIsmar e AlineFotos EventoIsmar e OttoManuel RobalinhoMarssel VilaçaFotos EventoFotos EventoLuciano CasadoMarssel e RobalinhoFabio DezanAline DamascenoFotos EventoRobalinho e Aline DamascenoJoão OttoFotos EventoAgenda de Palestrantes e Patrocinadores

 

#SITSAL2025 #SITBRASIL

entry.title: Re: Debugging ABAP in visual studio code
entry.content:
I pressed F5, but I got this

In the file workspace.json I have this

{
    "folders": [
      {
        "name": "TRL(ABAP)",
        "uri": "adt://trl"
      }
    ],
    "settings": {},
    "launch": {
      "version": "0.2.0",
      "configurations": [
        {
          "type": "abap",
          "request": "attach",
          "name": "Attach to server",
          "connId": "${command:abapfs.pickAdtRootConn}"
        }
      ]
    }
  }

entry.title: Failed to open the connection crytal reports in visual studio 2019 with Hana database
entry.content:
Hello, I'm new to programming. I would like to create a tool that reads my Crystal Reports .rpt file and sends the result by email. However, when I try to read the .rpt file, the connection fails. I'm using VS 2019, C# language.
Crystal Reports 13 SP37

I have already used commands like

SetDatabaseLogon(sqluser, sqlpassword, sqlserver, company);

or 

foreach (IConnectionInfo info in rpt.DataSourceConnections)
{
 info.SetLogon(UserID, Password);
 info.SetConnection(ServerName, DatabaseName, false);
}

foreach (ReportDocument sub in rpt.Subreports)
{
 foreach (IConnectionInfo info in sub.DataSourceConnections)
 {
 info.SetLogon(UserID, Password);
 info.SetConnection(ServerName, DatabaseName, UserID, Password);
 }

and it doesn't work

entry.title: Re: Advance shipment via Procurement
entry.content: Can we deliver the product to the customer's location rather receiving at warehouse?

entry.title: 回复： Confirm Production Operation -Material Movements not...
entry.content:
Dear Matt,

Thank you for your comment.
The issue was resolved by creating a case.

The cause was that the unit "EU" did not have an ISO unit.
The issue was resolved by performing maintenance on the IOS unit.

Thank you for your cooperation.

entry.title: MRP Strategy Group : Gross requirements planning - MTS(11)

Hello Members,
When I run MRP for a material with strategy group 11, don't created Planned Orders.

The item settings are based on this.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/74c0b3a391174482a66a3a23bb28c10d/f722bf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html

Have you ever encountered a similar issue?
If so, how did you solve it?
Please let me know if you have any idea about missing settings.

I would be grateful if you could help me.
Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Industrial Manufacturing 

#manufac

entry.title: Re: Hi, can I directly access dynamicconfiguration variab...
Re: Hi, can I directly access dynamicconfiguration variab...
entry.content: This reply is for Ryan-Crosby. Not sure why I can't directly comment under his. DynamicConfigurationBean allows you to modify header attributes and pass them between sender and receiver channels. I can achieve this by using ASMA.

entry.title: Re: Hi, can I directly access dynamicconfiguration variab...
entry.content: If I use DynamicConfigurationBean, will that allow me to use it inside the condition editor in Integrated Configuration as a xPath? Because only ContextObject and XPath are available in condition editor. The issue I have is not receiving the value from sender. I don't want to list Content-Type as a header for downstream system if value is not in the sender. Blank value will not solve my issue.

entry.title: Re: How to use CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>GET_SCREENSHOT?
entry.content:
*write scripts as per your organization guidelines to avoid compliance issue (Solution will help use of scripts in ABAP)

*best option is copy class from SAP 7.2 to SAP ECC 6 ( screen_shot method will work with minor *changes)

DATA: lv_command TYPE string,
      lv_length TYPE i,
      lv_lengthn TYPE i.
TYPES:
  ole2_object LIKE   obj_record,
  BEGIN OF ty_file ,
     field(256),
  END OF ty_file.
DATA: return TYPE i.
DATA: h_com1 TYPE ole2_object.         "// pointer to SAPINFO-Object
DATA: lt_command TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_file.
DATA: lt_bmpfile TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_file.

lv_command = 'powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -File "C:\ScreenCapture\screenshotApp.ps1"'.

*Create powershell file for screenshot
APPEND '#############################################################################' TO lt_command.
APPEND '# Capturing a screenshot' TO lt_command.
APPEND '#############################################################################' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$File = "C:\ScreenCapture\Screenshot.bmp"' TO lt_command.
APPEND 'Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms' TO lt_command.
APPEND 'Add-type -AssemblyName System.Drawing' TO lt_command.
APPEND '# Gather Screen resolution information' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$Screen = [System.Windows.Forms.SystemInformation]::VirtualScreen' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$Width = $Screen.Width' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$Height = $Screen.Height' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$Left = $Screen.Left' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$Top = $Screen.Top' TO lt_command.
APPEND '# Create bitmap using the top-left and bottom-right bounds' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $Width, $Height' TO lt_command.
APPEND '# Create Graphics object' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$graphic = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bitmap)' TO lt_command.
APPEND '# Capture screen' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$graphic.CopyFromScreen($Left, $Top, 0, 0, $bitmap.Size)' TO lt_command.
APPEND '# Save to file' TO lt_command.
APPEND '$bitmap.Save($File)' TO lt_command.
APPEND 'Write-Output "Screenshot saved to:"' TO lt_command.
APPEND 'Write-Output $File' TO lt_command.
APPEND '#############################################################################' TO lt_command.

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
  EXPORTING
    filename                        = 'C:\ScreenCapture\screenshotApp.ps1'
  TABLES
    data_tab                        = lt_command
*   FIELDNAMES                      =
 EXCEPTIONS
   file_write_error                = 1
   no_batch                        = 2
   gui_refuse_filetransfer         = 3
   invalid_type                    = 4
   no_authority                    = 5
   unknown_error                   = 6
   header_not_allowed              = 7
   separator_not_allowed           = 8
   filesize_not_allowed            = 9
   header_too_long                 = 10
   dp_error_create                 = 11
   dp_error_send                   = 12
   dp_error_write                  = 13
   unknown_dp_error                = 14
   access_denied                   = 15
   dp_out_of_memory                = 16
   disk_full                       = 17
   dp_timeout                      = 18
   file_not_found                  = 19
   dataprovider_exception          = 20
   control_flush_error             = 21
   OTHERS                          = 22
          .
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  EXIT.
ENDIF.


CREATE OBJECT h_com1 'SAPINFO' NO FLUSH.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  EXIT.
ENDIF.

CONSTANTS: sw_shownormal      TYPE i VALUE 1,
           sw_show            TYPE i VALUE 5,
           sw_hide            TYPE i VALUE 0.

CALL METHOD OF h_com1 'EXEC' = return
  EXPORTING #1 = lv_command
  #2 = sw_hide.

wait UP TO 1 SECONDS.
CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_UPLOAD'
  EXPORTING
    filename                = 'C:\ScreenCapture\Screenshot.bmp'
    filetype                = 'BIN'
  IMPORTING
    filelength              = lv_length
  TABLES
    data_tab                = lt_bmpfile
  EXCEPTIONS
    file_open_error         = 1
    file_read_error         = 2
    no_batch                = 3
    gui_refuse_filetransfer = 4
    invalid_type            = 5
    no_authority            = 6
    unknown_error           = 7
    bad_data_format         = 8
    header_not_allowed      = 9
    separator_not_allowed   = 10
    header_too_long         = 11
    unknown_dp_error        = 12
    access_denied           = 13
    dp_out_of_memory        = 14
    disk_full               = 15
    dp_timeout              = 16
    OTHERS                  = 17.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
*         WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.


CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
  EXPORTING
    filename                        = 'yourdrive'
    filetype = 'BIN'
    bin_filesize = lv_length
 IMPORTING
    filelength   = lv_lengthn
  TABLES
    data_tab                        =  lt_bmpfile
*   FIELDNAMES                      =
 EXCEPTIONS
   file_write_error                = 1
   no_batch                        = 2
   gui_refuse_filetransfer         = 3
   invalid_type                    = 4
   no_authority                    = 5
   unknown_error                   = 6
   header_not_allowed              = 7
   separator_not_allowed           = 8
   filesize_not_allowed            = 9
   header_too_long                 = 10
   dp_error_create                 = 11
   dp_error_send                   = 12
   dp_error_write                  = 13
   unknown_dp_error                = 14
   access_denied                   = 15
   dp_out_of_memory                = 16
   disk_full                       = 17
   dp_timeout                      = 18
   file_not_found                  = 19
   dataprovider_exception          = 20
   control_flush_error             = 21
   OTHERS                          = 22
          .
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  EXIT.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Hi, can I directly access dynamicconfiguration variab...
entry.content: Thanks Muniyappan. Yep. That's how we have it right now. The caller will determine which PI endpoint to call based on a parameter. One with Content-Type, and one without it. I'd like to see if there's a way to achieve this inside PI with 1 endpoint and have a condition checking for incoming Content-Type value. If blank, call endpoint without Content-Type to downstream system.

Kind Regards,

Pattranit

entry.title: Possibility of Enabling Daily Depreciation for Custom Depreciation Method
entry.content:
A custom depreciation method has been created. Is there any option to enable depreciation calculation on a daily basis for this custom method?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Possibility of Enabling Daily Depreciation for Custom...
entry.content:
To depreciation assets on a daily basis, the daily depreciation flag has to be selected.

  1. Go to the Business Configuration Work Center.
  2. Go to the Implementation Projects View.
  3. Select the First Implementation Project and select Open Activity List.
  4. Search for the Activity Depreciation Methods.
  5. Select the custom depreciation method creation.
  6. In the Control Parameters, check the checkbox for Depreciation Period to Exact Date.

entry.title: Re: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract / delta accrual
entry.content: Hi, it is actually not a Single Customer Sales Condition Rebates contract

entry.title: I am currently working on a project involving SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I need to integrate it into an existing BAPI in SAP S/4HANA. However, I'm facing an issue: I don't have access to the BAPI through the Actions group in SAP Build Process Automation. Therefore, I'm looking for a solution to connect to this BAPI via SAP BTP.

entry.title: Explore responsibilities during Azure integration with SAP RISE managed workloads
entry.content:
A crucial step towards modernization is integrating SAP managed environments, like RISE with SAP Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS) and SAP S/4HANA Cloud private edition (PCE) in Azure, with your existing Azure ecosystem.

Enablement of SAP RISE integration scenarios with Azure

It's important to distinguish SAP and customer responsibilities when enabling certain Azure scenarios. 

Although there are circumstances when an initial request needs to be placed with SAP RISE for enablement, most Azure scenarios depend on open network communication to available SAP interfaces and activities entirely within the customer's area of responsibility.

Support in Azure

For SAP RISE customers using Azure, the SAP landscape is within an Azure subscription owned and operated by SAP. This subscription and all associated Azure resources for your SAP environment are exclusively visible to and managed by SAP. Your Azure environment houses applications that interact with these SAP systems, including elements like the following:

  • Virtual networks
  • Network security groups
  • Firewalls
  • Routing

Additionally, Azure services such as Azure Data Factory and others operate within your subscription to access the SAP-managed landscape.

Only the resources within your personal Azure subscriptions are eligible for assistance from Azure support. For issues concerning any resources managed in SAP's Azure subscriptions for your SAP RISE workload, you should contact SAP support directly.

As part of your RISE project, document the interfaces and transfer points between your own Azure environment, the SAP workload managed by SAP RISE, and on-premises. The document should include network information such as the address space, firewalls and routing, file shares, Azure services, DNS, and others. Document the ownership of any interface partners and where any resources are running, to ensure that this information can be accessed quickly during troubleshooting. Contact SAP support for services running in SAP's Azure subscriptions.

RISE architecture

SAP creates and manages the entire SAP RISE architecture running in SAP's subscription and Azure tenant. SAP also decides, validates, and deploys all technical elements and details used by SAP for RISE in Azure. Microsoft and SAP work together to create the Azure infrastructure architectures optimized to support the RISE SLAs, to apply Azure best practices by Microsoft, and to adapt best practices to the challenges of SAP RISE managed services. The cooperation on Azure architecture as experienced by RISE customers includes continuous optimizations and adoption of new Azure functionalities to provide added value for RISE customers. Microsoft documents the integration part with SAP RISE in these documents, but not the details about SAP's used architecture, which is intellectual property of SAP. SAP might use modifications and optimizations in their employed architecture that differ from Microsoft's recommended architecture, to fulfill RISE SLAs and customer expectations. Work with SAP on the configuration and customization of your deployed RISE landscape, to fit your organization's requirements.

SAP is responsible for creating and managing the entire RISE architecture, which operates within SAP's subscription and Azure tenant. All technical elements and details utilized by SAP for RISE in Azure are decided upon, validated, and deployed by SAP.

Microsoft and SAP continuously collaborate to develop Azure infrastructure architectures that are optimized to support the RISE Service Level Agreements (SLAs). Together, Microsoft and SAP apply Azure best practices as documented by Microsoft, and adapt these practices to meet the unique challenges posed by the RISE-managed services.

The collaboration on Azure architecture provides RISE customers with continuous optimizations and the adoption of new Azure functionalities. While Microsoft documents the integration aspect with SAP RISE, it doesn't disclose the specifics of SAP's used architecture, which is SAP's intellectual property.

SAP may modify and optimize Microsoft's recommended architecture to meet RISE SLAs and customer expectations. Additionally, SAP works with customers to configure and customize the deployed RISE landscape to suit their organization's specific requirements.

https://lernix.com.my/empower-your-workforce-with-copilot-for-microsoft-365-use-cases/

entry.title: Re: Since i am fresher, i cant be able to perform Scope I...

Hello,

based on the related configuration, there is no difference (see screenshot).

In other (non public Cloud) functionalities, there are related settings but as I know not in Public Cloud.

Regards

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: SuccessConnect 2025 is headed to Las Vegas – and we want to hear from you!
entry.content:
SuccessConnect is heading to Las Vegas from October 6–8, and we want to hear from you.

What topics matter most to you and your HR team? Take the survey now

Your response to the survey is anonymous, and it only takes a few minutes to complete.

Thank you for being part of our community – we hope to see you at SuccessConnect!

entry.title: Re: Tips & Tricks with SAP Business Network for Logistics
entry.content: @zbaumann1 Yes, that's possible. Typically, Shippers would attach files in the TM system, which is then passed on to the carrier via the consumer APIs. As an example, look at the attachment node in this spec for Subcontracting. You can explore other consumer APIs, which will have an equivalent attachment node, through which carriers can expect shipper's documents.

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" for BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
1) firstly, did you try using the background task option, if it is not working then try creating update task logic.

2) create a custom function module, with update task, then use start immediately, call the BAPI_PO_CHANGE, inside the custom function. commit work will happen as per standard no explicit commit needed.

entry.title: Re: SAP JAVA component patch update(SCA) using telnet #ATR
entry.content:
Dear Ajay,

Thank you for sharing your experiences with the community.

I used this post as a guide for my initial fix.

Customer raised the ticket to implement the below security patch in SAP CRM Landscape.

3594142 - [CVE-2025-31324] Missing Authorization check in SAP NetWeaver (Visual Composer development server) - SAP for Me



Regards,
Mani.

entry.title: Re: Failed to start Solr server for instance
entry.content: same here

entry.title: Re: Library view - price and item description
entry.content: Hi, the learning version is b2505. I have checked now under Manage Labels and found the ID and deleted (estimated). But unfortunately it does not work for the new learning experience. Estimated is still there. Is there another label ID for the new experience?

entry.title: Build Process Automation: Call Web Service with Destination Timeout Error
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am configuring a standard process template "Supplier Invoice Status Check".

https://api.sap.com/package/eu10.storecontentdevacc.automaticsupplierinvoicestatuscheck2/overview

By following the configuration guide, I have created a communication user, communication arrangement, etc. in our S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant. The Destination has been configured as shown below:

I double-checked that this destination is accessible via SAP Business Application Studio.

However, when I test the process, it fails at the first "Call Web Service with Destination" step with the following error:

		{
			"code": "irpa_core.error.Timeout",
			"message": "Timeout error: call callHttpRequest"
		}

The following is the request object passed to the step:

		{
			"url": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartnerAddress?$filter=BusinessPartner eq '15300002'&$format=json&$select=AddressID",
			"method": "GET",
			"responseType": "json",
			"resolveBodyOnly": true,
			"timeout": 30000,
			"encodeDestinationPath": true
		}

The URL is working fine from Postman (with the same user and password used in the destination).

Does anyone have an idea why this timeout error is occurring?

entry.title: Re: MRP Strategy Group : Gross requirements planning - MT...
entry.content:
Hello,

I tested your scenario and for me it is looking different. When I use strategy 11 with the related settings from your screenshot the system is creating PIRs with category BSF (see my screenshot from MD04).

But the system does not show the planning segment in Monitor material coverage app (seems not to be supported).

In you screenshot I can see that you have LSF requirements. Probably you have created the requirements before setting up the master data correctly.

Please check and let me know, if you can confirm this.

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: ECC to S/4HANA Lift & Shift and Consolidation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We're currently planning the migration of functionality and data from our legacy SAP ECC system to S/4HANA. Our ECC system handles front office functionalities such as Customer-to-Cash (C2C) and Sales & Distribution (S&D), integrated with peripheral systems for Order Management and Billing for multiple customers. Meanwhile, our S/4HANA system serves as the Book of Record (BoR) offering General Ledger (G/L) and Accounts Payable (AP) functionalities. Both systems interact with other enterprise and partner systems via SAP Process Integration (PI) and third-party platforms.

We've identified a "Lift & Shift" approach as the fastest and least risky migration strategy. While this may initially limit our ability to exploit S/4HANA's innovations, it will set the groundwork for future business transformation.

I would appreciate insights from those who have undertaken similar migrations:

  1. Lift & Shift: What methodology did you employ for the Lift & Shift process? Any best practices to share?

  2. Custom Code Adaptation: Did you utilize native SAP tools or third-party accelerators to adapt custom code to S/4HANA?

  3. Integration Strategy: What strategy did you follow for migrating integrations? Insights on effort and challenges would be valuable.

  4. SAP BTP: Did you use BTP to move customizations out of the core ERP system, and was this feasible with a Lift & Shift approach? If not, were there other reasons for leveraging BTP, considering the approach taken?

  5. Consolidation: Did you consider consolidating SAP instances into one? Were there any compelling reasons to maintain two separate S/4HANA instances?

  6. Data Quality and Cleansing: How did you address data quality and cleansing during the migration process? Were there specific tools or methodologies used?

  7. Testing and Validation: What testing and validation strategies did you implement to ensure the migrated data and functionalities worked as expected in S/4HANA?

  8. Change Management: Any key strategies for training and communication that helped ease the transition?

  9. Performance Optimization: Post-migration, were there any particular optimizations or adjustments required to enhance system performance in S/4HANA?

  10. Security and Compliance: How did you ensure security and compliance during the migration process? Were there any specific challenges or solutions?

I do not expect a response to all of the topics, but anything you may have valuable information to share.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Setup of FP2502 fails on new Windows Server
entry.content: SAP note 2538555 claims to be for HANA. Is it valid for MS SQL as well?

entry.title: Re: Not able to run MDK application through run as local...

Thanks for responding, We are getting the similar error while using Northwind Services or any other Sample Service. And Could you please detail out like what we need to check in BTP configurations or Mobile Services.

Thanks and Regards,

Madhav

entry.title: Re: EWM PPF Change Output Device
entry.content:
Hi @scottcarricknwn,

Where did you face issue, delivery note, label print,... ?Did you check the logs ? If not, please activate and see

Please see below PPF document for your knowledge where you find details...Output device setting

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/jSy4Xih/PPF_in_SAP_EWM_2021.pdf?rc=10

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: RSP Execution Failed
entry.content:
Hi kumu94
Please reinstall RSP as per SAP Note 1819711. If that doesn't resolve the issue, please open a incident using component SBO-RSP component.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Valuation area 002 cannot be the paying valuation area in acctg code 1000Message no. TPM_TRG155
entry.content:
Hello,
Can you please let us know your question?
If you want to let everyone know what you've found out, can you kindly press the "Accept as Solution" bar so that it is clear that you're providing the answer together with your question?
Thank you very much.
Kind regards,
Henrike

entry.title: 回复： Confirm Production Operation -Material Movements not...
entry.content: You're welcome and thanks for the feedback.

entry.title: Whether Microsoft SQL server Standard Edition is supported by SAP DATA Services?
entry.content:
Team, Good day!

 

We would like to know whether Microsoft SQL server Standard Edition is supported by SAP DATA Services.

 

I see there is a note for BOBJ. Does the same approach work for Data services?

 

Please do share us the details if there is any impact or restrictions with standard edition for SAP data services

 

3372994 - Is Microsoft SQL server Standard Edition supported with SAP BusinessObjects Platform ? - SAP for Me


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Whether Microsoft SQL server Standard Edition is supp...
entry.content:
Yes, Microsoft SQL server Standard Edition is supported by SAP DATA Services.

You can find the information from page 15 of DS PAM:

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/launchpad/en_us/pam/pam-essentials/TIP/PAM_DataServices_4_3.pdf

 

Extraction:

(2) Both Enterprise and Standard versions are supported.

entry.title: API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV is not holding value in RefServiceOrderTemplate when triggered from C4C
entry.content:
Requirement: In C4C Ticket application when we click on ‘Create Service’ order (follow-up document) button, expectation is to Pass Service order Template ID from C4C to S4 Hana through Service order creation API (API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV), In S4 Hana, while system creating Service order copy all the Items maintained on Service order Template into Service order.

But, API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV is not holding value in RefServiceOrderTemplate when triggered from C4C into S4 Hana.

entry.title: Re: What is the different between Multidimension analysis...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question!

First of all, I'll share the links to the SAP Help Portal documentation:

Multidimensional Data Grid Apps

Multidimensional Analysis

The following blog provides a great overview:

Multidimensional Analysis a Stepstone to modern Reporting in S/4HANA CE2502

And I will share your question with the experts.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: how to get participant handbook for codejam re: event...
entry.content: @erza, if you have access to AEM, you might be able to complete the first part of the CodeJam. You will still be missing the S4HC mock system that sends events to AEM, but there is a public Docker image that you can run locally to send events to your AEM: https://hub.docker.com/r/ajmaradiaga/s4-mock-server-with-bp-created-events. It is the exact same service we are running for the CodeJam.

entry.title: Re: Setup of FP2502 fails on new Windows Server
entry.content: Hi, for SQL please check note 2788059.

entry.title: Re: Sales Return on the basis of Tax Invoice in Public cloud
entry.content:
Are you inquiring about the credit memo process?

Credit Memo Processing (1EZ)

Could you explain the process? Since the invoice has already been completed, you'll need to issue a credit and follow the steps outlined above.
